text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day in late December, I see Admire Vega
unusually engrossed in a newly arrived racing
magazine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The main article is on the Umamusume who will be
competing in the upcoming year-end Grand Prix,
the Arima Kinen.
choice_data_list: Oh, by the way...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: Narita Top Road was chosen to run, right?
Narita Top Road was chosen to run, right?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She's really popular...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega slowly traces her finger along the
article.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Thank you for choosing me. I'll do my very best
to live up to your expectations!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she examines Narita Top Road's radiant photo,
her eyes narrow just slightly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her facial expressions now are less stern
compared to when we first met...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's fast approaching the three-year milestone
since her debut race. And, fortunately, the
holidays are almost here.
choice_data_list:
(I want to give her a gift for all the hard work
she's done.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I go searching everywhere for a
gift, but...
choice_data_list: (Agh, I can't decide!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to give her something she'll be happy to
receive, but I need some kind of clue for the right
approach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eventually, my anxious pondering brings my
attention to the perfect person to help with this
task.
choice_data_list: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wah!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whoa there, if it isn't Ayabe's trainer!
choice_data_list: Curren Chan! This is perfect timing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who better to ask for gift advice than Admire
Vega's roommate? I'm certain she'll have an idea!
choice_data_list: I have something I want to ask you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... About thaaat...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Can't help you! ♪
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm in a bit of a rush! So, like, sorryyy!
choice_data_list: Ah, okay. Sorry for the bother.
Ah, okay. Sorry for the bother.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame I have to return home empty-handed,
but I accept it... The following day...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Okay... so...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I see... also...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! In that case... after which...
choice_data_list: (It's all her rivals!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They might be able to give me some useful
information. I muster up the courage to approach
them.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hwaagh?! A-Ayabe's trainer?!
choice_data_list:
Sorry to interrupt you all, but I wanted to ask
something.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haah ha ha! ...Retreat!
choice_data_list: What?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, umm... that would make me feel bad, but...
Uhhh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'm really sorry! Goodbye!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: W-wait for meee!
choice_data_list: What was that all about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I don't get the chance to ask my
question.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, everyone close to Admire Vega
is blatantly ignoring me. Was it something I did?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I need to reconsider the way I act? As I
spend time mulling over the issue...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The big day arrives before I know it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eventually settled on giving her a comfy sports
towel, but I'm beginning to worry it might be too
boring of a gift.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking I should follow up with a little extra, I
decide to try putting up holiday decorations
around the room, though I'm not sure this would
get a positive reaction from her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hello...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the midst of all my fruitless worrying, Admire
Vega suddenly turns up.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Um...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Happy Holidays.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In her hand is a small gift...
choice_data_list: Huh? Is that?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sorry, before that, I need to ask...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why are you trying to give me a gift?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Curren? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you later—let's hurry and get out of here!
Your trainer showed up outta nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know, right?! And it sounds like it's for the same
reason we're here.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: To buy a present!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're kidding... But why?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We can figure that out later! First of all, we need
to leave!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You don't want your trainer figuring what you bought, do you?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You're right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Ayabe, Ayabe! Listen, we have to go! Your
trainer is right over there!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And, and, and... I th-think I know why! I think your
trainer's here to buy you a present!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I know, but why though?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you give will just make me want to
return the favor in kind.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And... you've already done so much for me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Helping me discover and understand who I really
am.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Putting me through all this training...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Watching me in all my races...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Following me down the path I chose...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And pushing me forward whenever I lost my way.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'm the one who has to repay you for everything
you've done. And after asking around, I finally
decided on something.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But now you've thrown things off balance by
getting me a gift too... I don't know what to do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the same uncompromising sense of duty
that kept her bent on repaying her perceived
debt to her late sister.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Remembering all of this, I shake my head slowly.
choice_data_list: You don't have to worry about any of that.
You don't have to worry about any of that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why?
choice_data_list: You've done tons for me too.
You've done tons for me too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That isn't true at all...
choice_data_list:
I got to watch your fantastic running so many
times.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's—
choice_data_list: I got to help you in achieving your dreams.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What? That's not—
choice_data_list: And I've had the honor of being your trainer!
And I've had the honor of being your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After staying silent for a moment, Admire Vega
lets out an incredibly long sigh before beginning
to talk.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You know... I've been thinking this for a while...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I really don't understand you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The package I receive from Admire Vega contains
a simple navy blue fountain pen.
choice_data_list: The color reminds me of nighttime. It's great.
The color reminds me of nighttime. It's great.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I thought so too. That's why I bought it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I thought so too. That's why I bought it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The evening unexpectedly turns into a gift
exchange, with Admire Vega finally accepting my
present.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's a towel?
choice_data_list: Sorry, I went with the safest option.
Sorry, I went with the safest option.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No, that doesn't bother me...
choice_data_list: I tried to choose a super fluffy one though!
I tried to choose a super fluffy one though!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... you definitely threw things off balance
with this gift.
choice_data_list: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...This is exactly the type of thing I like.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I really like fluffy things.
